pull_requests.title: fix: update Gemini model references to 3.1 Pro
pull_requests.author: tsavo-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Updates all human-readable display strings, CLI descriptions, and documentation from Gemini 3 Pro or Gemini Pro to Gemini 3.1 Pro. Model ID constants were already correct.

pull_requests.title: fix: add Preview suffix to Gemini references and regenerate CI workflow
pull_requests.author: tsavo-at-pieces
pull_requests.summary: Adds the Preview suffix to Gemini 3.1 Pro references across display strings, doc comments, and documentation to match the gemini-3.1-pro-preview model ID. Also regenerates the CI workflow file.
